item.title: 24-Hour Career Boost 🚀 • Identify 3 key skills you excel at. • Update your résumé with specific achievements. • Use: “I improved X by Y% through Z.” • Research top interview questions in your field. • Practice answers using concrete examples. How will you ensure your résumé and interview skills stand out? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: 24-Hour Career Boost 🚀 • Identify 3 key skills you excel at. • Update your résumé with specific achievements. • Use: “I improved X by Y% through Z.” • Research top interview questions in your field. • Practice answers using concrete examples. How will you ensure your résumé and interview skills stand out? #career #interview #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
